title: Senior Java Software Engineer
job_type_tags:
Hybrid
Matches your job preferences, workplace type is Hybrid.
description:
About the job
Senior Java Engineer
Java, Springboot, AWS
$175k - $205k base, + super + bonus
OR
$900-$1050 per day
Sydney – Hybrid

How does joining a pillar of Australia’s economy sound? How about the opportunity to work on a number of exciting projects that will keep you pushing boundaries with huge scope for growth?

We are currently working with one of Australia’s leading financial institutions whose talented team of Engineers are consistently pushing boundaries.

This is a chance for a Senior Java Engineer with experience in the development of monolithic and microservice architecture to work within the Digital team, who are responsible for the development of new offers and products for it's customers. You'll be collaborating with cross-functional teams to design and ship new features.

The Role & Responsibilities
Responsible for the design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance of the team owned product and platforms
Knowledge in building scalable, maintainable and low latency web applications
Collaborating with cross-functional team

Your experience:
Minimum 6+ years experience in Java
Java, Springboot, Spring Hibernate
Experience working on projects from inception to production
Ideally have experience in finance or banking
Effective communication, facilitation, influencing and negotiation skills.
Able to effectively engage with senior members across the business.

If you’re a Senior Java Engineer and you’d like to learn more about this role, then simply click the apply button.
